parameter_a.notes: Legal entity PT. RUPIAH JAYA UTAMA. Address provided. Contact via WhatsApp: 6282133014951. Email: [email protected]

parameter_b.notes: CRITICAL: Operating as Payment Gateway/Aggregator (processes payments for other merchants). Claims to work through 'partnership with licensed payment gateway' but NO BI PJP license found. PSE registered at Kominfo. Claims: 'kami tidak menyediakan layanan produk jasa keuangan secara independen' - however aggregator services ARE regulated.

parameter_c.notes: Services clearly described: QRIS, Virtual Account, E-Wallet (DANA, GOPAY, OVO, ShopeePay), Bank transfers, Retail (Indomaret, Alfamart). API integration provided. Payment gateway aggregator services.

parameter_d.notes: Transparent fees: VA Rp 3,500, E-Wallet 3%, QRIS 0.7%, Retail Rp 3,000. Settlement H+0 to H+1. Missing refund policy and dispute process.

parameter_e.notes: Has T&C page and Privacy Policy. Missing: cancellation policy, refund policy, dispute clause. Website claims AES256 encryption and SSL/TLS.

parameter_f.notes: WhatsApp support available. FAQ section. Email and phone provided. No documented SLA or escalation path.

parameter_g.notes: Has privacy policy. Claims SSL/TLS and AES256 encryption. PDP compliance not verified.

parameter_h.notes: Website functional. Has login system. Claims SSL/TLS and AES256 encryption. Security Policy page available.

parameter_i.notes: No Play Store/App Store app. Limited social media presence. Member of Fintech Indonesia (AFTECH). No significant news coverage found.

general_notes: CRITICAL: Saku Rupiah is a Payment Gateway/Aggregator processing payments for OTHER merchants (offers QRIS, VA, E-Wallet, etc.). This is a REGULATED ACTIVITY requiring BI PJP license. They claim to operate through 'partnership with licensed payment gateway' but this does NOT exempt them from licensing requirements. NO BI PJP license found = AUTO-REJECT.
